# .kilocodeignore — excludes generated/build files from KiloCode context

# Dart generated files
**/*.g.dart
**/*.freezed.dart
**/*.mocks.dart
**/*.config.dart
**/*.drift.dart

# Build output
build/
.dart_tool/
.flutter-plugins
.flutter-plugins-dependencies

# Android build artifacts
android/.gradle/
android/app/build/
android/build/

# iOS
ios/Pods/
ios/.symlinks/

# KiloCode SHOULD still read:
# lib/**/*.dart  (your source files)
# pubspec.yaml
# android/app/build.gradle
# AGENTS.md
# KILOCODE.md
# CURRENT_STATE.md
# TASK.md
# supabase/schema.sql
